# PagerdutyHeartbeatJobComponent

Send a PagerDuty heartbeat (resolve event) — confirms a job is alive on a cadence.

## Dependencies
- `requests`

## What this is
A **Dagster job** (no asset materialized) — the component installs a `dg.job`
plus an optional schedule. Lineage graph stays clean; the work happens
behind the scenes.

## See also
- [Schema](schema.json) · [Example config](example.yaml)

|---|---|---|

|---|---|---|---|

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `schedule` | `str` | — | Cron schedule (None = no schedule) |
| `routing_key_env` | `str` | `"PAGERDUTY_ROUTING_KEY"` | Env var with PD Events API integration key |
| `summary` | `str` | `"Dagster job heartbeat"` | — |
| `source` | `str` | `"dagster"` | `source` field for the event |
| `severity` | `str` | `"info"` | critical \| error \| warning \| info |
